titleStmt.title: SII 25.213: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 213. (A.R. No. 213 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North base of the verandah in the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

This incomplete record furnishes the details of date viz., Regnal year 17, Ṛishabha śu 3, Sunday and Pūsam (Pushya)-nakshatra corresponding to 1263 A.D., May 13, Sunday. But the tithi was pañchami on that day.

It records the grant of maḍakku lands, made after the purchase from several individuals by the peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhai of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷaṉkulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, as iṟaiyili to provide for the food-offerings to the deity on the occasion of Irā[śarāśa*]dēvaṉ-sandhi instituted after Periya-uḍaiyar Rā[ja*]rā[ja*]dēvaṉ alias Pallavarāyar who is described as the son (piḷḷai) of the deity. The yield of 59 kalam, 2 tūṇi-kuruṇi-4 nāḻi of paddy resulted from out of the tirunāmattukkāṇi lands of the god in the east of the village Uśāttāṉam was endowed and entrusted to the Ādichaṇḍēśvara-dēvakaṉmigaḷ of the temple to meet the food-offerings. Among the boundaries of the gift lands mention may be made of the highway (peruvaḻi) leading to Kalliyāṇapuraṅkoṇḍaśōḻapuram, the Muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉ-peruvaḻi, Vikramaśōḻanallūr, Pirāntakapuram, Aiyyaṉkiḍaṅguḍaiyār-kōyil, etc.
The decision of the mahāsabhai was attested by the village accountants (ūrk-kaṇakku) Tiruvaraṅgappiriyaṉ and Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷappiriyaṉ and several others (names mentioned).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irācentira coḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉ Eḻāvatu I
ṣebhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum nāyaṟṟuk-kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ Irācentira coḻavaḷanā
ṭṭup puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉiccaruppetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiru Ucāttā
ṉa muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevakaṉmikaḷukku Ivvūr peruṅkuṟi^1^ mahāsabhayom Ūrkkiḻ
iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattiirupāv varukiṟa nilattu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku piḷḷai
yāna periyaluṭaiyār Irācarāca tevanāṉa pallavarāyar kaṇṭa Irācarāca tevaṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppa
ṭi Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyiṟṟuk kuṭalāka Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta kalliyāṇa puraṅko
ṇṭa coḻapurattup pokiṟa peruvaḻikkut teṟkkum kaḷiṅkapperāṟṟukku kiḻakku 10 2taṭi rūpāy mā3 mā muṉṉūṟ
ṟuvaṉ peruvaḻikku kiḻakku tevaṅkuṭaiyāṉ ṭaiya muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉ Oḻukkaikku kiḻakku vaṭakkaṭaiya
vum meṟkaṭaiyavum rūpāy 4mā þ kiḻakku nta Ñ Þ 1 � rūpay2mā10 2kiḻakku rūpāy 4mā þ kiḻakku n=ta Ūril Uṭamaru
varukiṟa mikuḷattukkup pukka Oḻukkaikkut teṟku Ātitta tevar Aṉṉar Ākkiṉa tirunantavaṉamāy Iṟaiyili ce
ytu kuṭutta nilattukkut teṟkup pārattuvāci cempiyaṉ pirammārāyar pakkal vilaikoṇṭa kayilāya mayak
kal Eṉṟu yerperppaṭṭa nilattu rūpāyñ kiḻakku ntama Ñ 10 1 kūli rūpāy ¿ kiḻakku � ¿8kūli rūpāy ¿ ñ kiḻakku ç �
nyakāmikuḷam rūpāy 2mā kiḻakku ø varuṣam vilaikoṇṭa 10vu kū rūpāy 6 tmamūṉṟumā kiḻakku 6 mūṉṟumā Itaṉ teṟku meṟpaṭiyār pakka
l vilaikoṇṭap puṉcey nilattu meṟ 6kū rūpāy 6 vikkirama coḻa nallūr Ellaikkut teṟ
ku Āṇṭār prasaṉṉa tevar nilamāy Iṉṉāyaṉār Iṟaiyili nilattukkut teṟku
rūpāy 1kāṇi 5 10 1 kūli rūpāy � tiruviḻā vitikku vaṭakku rūpāy � kiḻakku (1/2) varuṣam � kiḻakku (1/2)
itaṉ kiḻakkuk kāmikuḷattukkup pukka Oḻukkaikkuk kiḻakku 10 1kū rūpāy 1kāṇi ñ kiḻakku (1/4) Ūrukku kiḻa
kku pirāntaka purattukkup pokiṟa Oḻukkaikkut teṟku rūpāy 1kāṇi¿2mukkāl kiḻakku mukkāl (1/4) 4mūṉṟumā rūpāy mata kū rūpāy
� muṉṉūṟṟuvanalūṟu vaḻikku maṭakku vaṭakkil maṅka
la vitiyil niṉṟum teṟku nokkip pokiṟa Oḻukkaikku kiḻakku 10 1 � mūṉṟumā � I
taṉ kiḻakku � māvaṉṉār kuḷattukku vaṭakku
� tiruviḻā vatikku teṟku vikkiramaco
ḻa nallūr Ellaikkuk kiḻakku Aiyyaṉ kiṭaṅkuṭaiyār koyilṟ Okiṟa Oḻukkaikku vaṭakku nila
ttu � cāttaṉ kuḷattu miḻalai cirāmapaṭṭaṉum Amantarātitta ve
ḷāṉum pakkal vilaikoṇṭu pukunta rūpāy mūṉṟumā pata Irāmpalūrttuyya kotipaṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa rūpāy
nyam(m) Āka 10 2 kū rūpāy ma mta Āka rūpāy 2 10yokmavata �cā kū rūpāy cāṉāl maṭakku rūpāy kiḻakku (1/4)ḍa6kū
(1/4)ta maṭakku � ṉāl maṭakku � ṉāl maṭakku rūpāy kiḻakku mūṉṟumā
� ṉāl maṭakku � ma 10 2 � ṉāya maṭa
kku kiḻakku 4 kiśakku mukkāl ma 10 2 � ṉāl maṭakki rūpāy kiḻakku mukkāl mukkāṇi ṉāl maṭakki rūpāy kiḻakku mukkāl mukkāṇi ma þ kiḻakku l mūṉṟumā
Āka rūpāy 100 2 10mā tma þ kiḻakku mā mukkāṇi mūṉṟumā ṉāl vaṭakku rūpāy mūṉṟumā kiḻakku � mukkāl l Oṭṭuppaṭi poṉ rūpāy 1000 4 100
iṉellu Aimpattoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe Irutūṇikkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum Iṉṉāyaṉār
kku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa vaiyiṟṟukkuṭalāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom U
ṭaiyār tiruucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevakaṉmikaḷukku I Ūr
peruṅkuṟi mahāsapaiyom Ippaṭikku Ivai Ūrkkaṇakkut tiruvaraṅkappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai Ūrk kaṇakku Aḻakiya maṇavāḷappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr mu
ṭ taṭṭic citāmaṇṭayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷattūr Avinalocaṉa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruveḷḷaṟai tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Irāmalūrttuyya cotipaṭṭaṉ
ṉeḻuttu Ivai pārattuvāci Utaiya tivākara paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai peri nampi tāmotaraRedundent.
Digital edition of SII 25.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
